# Lighthouse Storage

Lighthouse Storage provides scalable, permanent decentralized data storage on IPFS & Filecoin for developers, businesses, and individuals.

## Core Offerings
- **Permanent Storage**: Pay once and store your files forever. No recurring monthly subscriptions.
- **Decentralized Infrastructure**: Built on IPFS and Filecoin, ensuring data availability, immutability, and security.
- **Access Control**: Encrypt and store data securely with fine-grained access control features.
- **Developer Ecosystem**: Simple APIs, SDKs, and CLI tools to integrate Web3 storage directly into your applications.

## Resources
- Website: https://lighthouse.storage/
- Documentation: https://docs.lighthouse.storage/
- GitHub: https://github.com/lighthouse-web3
- Twitter: @LighthouseWeb3
